metadata.description: Tecnos-STRIDE VALUE Upstream Extension marketplace — provides the cowork-plugin for upstream business consultants (BABOK v3 / Layered Requirements Modeling / value-driven discovery method integrated SDD plugin).

plugins.name: tecnos-stride-value
plugins.description: Tecnos-STRIDE VALUE Upstream Extension Plugin for Claude Cowork. Empowers business consultants (non-technical users) to author Phase 0 (BACCM Discovery / BABOK Elicit / Layered Context Modelling with 4-layer Requirements Architecture), Phase 1 (basic_design.md + process.bpmn), and optional Epic decomposition from natural-language customer requirements, following BABOK v3 best practices augmented with layered requirements modeling and value-driven discovery (concepts only, no proprietary brand names). v0.4.0 bundles a self-contained BPMN 2.0 / Camunda 8 authoring pack (rules + OMG+Camunda 8.9 dictionary + FEAT/EPIC templates + examples + stdlib-only validator) under bpmn/ component for upstream BPMN documentation creation. Generates SDD-compliant artifacts ready for Claude Code handoff.
